def has_any_active_users(users: list) -> bool:
    return any(user.is_active for user in users)


def all_orders_valid(orders: list) -> bool:
    return all(order.is_valid() for order in orders)


def find_duplicate_emails(users: list) -> list:
    emails = [user.email for user in users]
    return any(emails.count(e) > 1 for e in emails)


def check_permissions(user, required_perms: list) -> bool:
    return all(p in user.permissions for p in required_perms)


def has_eligible_items(cart_items: list) -> bool:
    return any(item.price > 0 and item.stock > 0 for item in cart_items)


def validate_all_rules(data: dict, rules: list) -> bool:
    return all(rule.validate(data) for rule in rules)
